# dist/ — generated docs payload

Auto-generated by the spec build (`npm run build`). Do not edit by hand — re-run the build to
regenerate. The layout mirrors the memo-init meta-spec standard (Memo 060 P5 adoption):

```
dist/
├── manifest.json                     cross-family index (families[], per-family files[])
├── inverted-map.json                 skill -> spec projection (read-only)
├── <family>/<version>/
│   ├── spec/<NN-name>.md             chapter payload (frontmatter + content-first body)
│   ├── bridge/<NN-name>.md           per-page bridge projection
│   ├── bridge/<NN-name>.backlink.md  rendered "Implemented by" backlink (dist-only)
│   ├── bridge/<NN>-bridge.md         enhanced bridge hub (with Astro frontmatter)
│   └── data/spec-manifest.json       copied per-version manifest (sidebar groups[])
```

Families are discovered from `draft/*/spec.json`; the authored sources live under
`draft/<family>/<version>/spec/`. Each payload chapter carries YAML frontmatter (title,
description, family, spec_version, order, section, normative, provenance) and has its body H1 +
top metadata table stripped (reading order is content-first; the bottom `## Related` footer keeps
the links). Same-family `./NN-name.md` links are rewritten to the family's own published route.

The build pipeline (see `../package.json`): `generate-refs` → `generate-docs-payload` →
`generate-bridge` → `generate-manifest` → `check-bridge-inverse`. The quality gates are
`audit-spec-quality` (structural invariants) and `check-bridge-inverse` (map ↔ bridge agreement).
